Name: Silicone feet
Purpose: Small pads on the bottom of the case to prevent slipping.

Name: Hot melt inserts
Purpose: Inserts for securing the 3D-printed case pieces together.

Name: Screws M3x8
Purpose: Screws for assembling the PCB and case.

Name: Keycaps
Purpose: Plastic caps that sit on top of the switches and show the letters/symbols.

Name: SK6812 LEDs
Purpose: Mini RGB LEDs for backlighting, allowing customizable colors and effects.

Name: OLED Display 1.5"
Purpose: Small OLED screen to show typing stats, lighting controls, or custom information.

Name: Gateron Switches
Purpose: Mechanical key switches that provide tactile or linear feedback when typing.

Name: Hot swap sockets
Purpose: PCB-mounted sockets that allow switches to be inserted and removed without soldering.

Name: 1N4148 Diodes
Purpose: Standard diodes used in the keyboard matrix to prevent "ghosting" when multiple keys are pressed.

Name: 10kΩ Resistors
Purpose: Pull-up resistors used in the keyboard matrix to ensure proper key detection.

Name: 100nF Capacitors
Purpose: Decoupling capacitors that smooth out voltage fluctuations and reduce electrical noise.

Name: 74AHCT125
Purpose: Logic level shifter to safely interface different voltage components in the keyboard matrix.

Name: YD-RP2040
Purpose: Microcontroller board (like a Raspberry Pi Pico) that runs the keyboard firmware and connects via USB-C.
